name: Dirge of the Lost Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>亡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>旋律</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ストレイン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card by declaring 1 card name. Each time the declared card, or its effect, is activated, halve its owner's LP immediately after it resolves. During the End Phase, if this card halved a player's LP this turn, send this card to the GY. While your opponent controls a monster, this card cannot be destroyed by card effects.
eff: Activate this card by declaring 1 card name. Each time the declared card, or its effect, is activated, halve its owner's LP immediately after it resolves. During the End Phase, if this card halved a player's LP this turn, send this card to the GY. While your opponent controls a monster, this card cannot be destroyed by card effects.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
